hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.pem$|\.key$|\.p12$|\.pfx$|/secrets/|/credentials/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot access secrets files (.pem, .key, .p12, .pfx, secrets/, credentials/)' >&2; exit 1; fi
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env.example) ;; *.env|*.env.*) echo "BLOCKED: .env files must never be edited by Claude — edit .env.example instead" && exit 1 ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.pbxproj|*.xcworkspace*) echo "BLOCKED: Xcode project files (.pbxproj, .xcworkspace) must never be modified by Claude" && exit 1 ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */api/src/*.ts) npx --prefix /Users/buta/Repos/track-em-toys/api eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -60 ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */web/src/*.ts|*/web/src/*.tsx) npx --prefix /Users/buta/Repos/track-em-toys/web eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -60 ;; esac
